mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material(code, name, category_id, specification, unit, purchase_price, sell_price, min_stock, max_stock, description) VALUES(#{code}, #{name}, #{categoryId}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{purchasePrice}, #{sellPrice}, #{minStock}, #{maxStock}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE material SET status=0 WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM material WHERE id=#{id} AND status=1
SELECT * FROM material WHERE code=#{code} AND status=1

SELECT * FROM material
status=1
AND code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND specification LIKE CONCAT('%', #{spec}, '%')
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT m.* FROM material m LEFT JOIN stock s ON m.id = s.material_id WHERE m.status=0 GROUP BY m.id HAVING COALESCE(SUM(s.quantity), 0) < m.min_stock
